title: Piptomeris rhadinoclona

Further classification includes the subclass Rosidae and the division Magnoliophyta. This classification reflects the plant's botanical relationships and evolutionary history. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
